input: Drone: alpha-7; GPS: -26.2041,28.0473; Altitude: 128m; Battery: 41%; Wind: 18km/h; Rotor vibration: 0.83; Camera horizon drift: 4.2 degrees
output: Anomaly detected: rotor imbalance on the rear-left motor. Reduce airspeed, hold position for 10 seconds, and if vibration persists route the drone back to the maintenance waypoint.

input: Robot: rover-12; Mission: substation inspection; LiDAR confidence: 0.48; Wheel slip: 0.31; Obstacle map: blocked on south corridor; Battery: 62%
output: Navigation risk detected: the south corridor path is unreliable because LiDAR confidence is low and wheel slip is elevated. Re-route through the east aisle and slow the robot to inspection speed.

input: Location: North Gate; Camera-04 motion score: 0.92; Camera-08 thermal delta: 6.1; Access badge event: none; Time: 23:42 local
output: Probable intrusion event. Two cameras show correlated movement and heat signatures without a matching badge event. Escalate to perimeter response and keep live video pinned for operator review.

input: Zone: River District; Water level sensor: 0.87; Rainfall rate: 28mm/h; Pump station status: degraded; Traffic sensor congestion index: 0.74
output: Flood readiness alert. Water levels and rainfall indicate rising flood risk while pump performance is degraded. Notify city operations, pre-stage barriers, and divert traffic from low-lying streets.

instruction: Reason about a geographic deployment plan
input: Incident: fire alarm near depot-3; Nearby assets: drone bravo at 1.2km, patrol robot rho at 0.8km, camera mast cm-19 at 0.4km; Wind direction: west-east
output: Deploy camera mast cm-19 for immediate visual confirmation, route patrol robot rho to secure the depot perimeter, and launch drone bravo from the west so smoke drift does not block the initial camera pass.

input: Cluster: edge-prod-2; Kubernetes alerts: node memory pressure on worker-3; OpenStack compute host: overloaded; AI inference queue latency: 940ms; Camera ingestion pods restarting: 3
output: Stabilize the edge cluster by draining worker-3, scaling the camera ingestion deployment to healthy nodes, and moving queued inference jobs off the overloaded OpenStack host before latency breaches the 1-second threshold.
